name: Avery Bloom
bio: Abstract painter obsessed with bright edges and soft gradients.

name: Malik Rivers
bio: Ceramics and small sculpture with a love for imperfect symmetry.

name: Jun Park
bio: Risograph + printmaking. Posters, zines, and the occasional weird bird.

name: Sofia Vega
bio: Documentary-style photography and portraits with a cinematic feel.

name: Rowan Clarke
bio: Wood + mixed media. If it can be joined, it can be art.

name: Imani Stone
bio: Textile artist weaving loud color stories into soft objects.

name: Casey Hart
bio: Oil paintings with moody lighting and too many shadows (on purpose).

name: Priya Desai
bio: Ink drawings, micro-details, and the occasional giant mural.

name: Luis Moreno
bio: Metal work and kinetic pieces. Things that move are better.

name: Nina Fox
bio: Collage + found materials. Paper archaeology, basically.

name: Harper Quinn
bio: Glass and light studies — reflections are the whole point.
